MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2006 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. (NO SASE, ENDORSED FILED COPY PLACED IN OUT BOX OUTSIDE ROOM 633.)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO CLAIMANT FRIAS, VINCENT HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS CONTINUED FROM AUG-16-2006 TO DISCOVERY ON SEP-14-2006, 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 612 PER MOVING PARTY

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $300.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT VINCENT FRIAS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1214.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
